headline: What You Actually Pay To Join The CSCO Run
summary: The networking giant is on a tear, powered by a genuine business surge, but for investors arriving now, the critical question is what the ticket costs.

headline: Seagate (STX) Lands BNP Paribas AI Supply Chain Backing Through 2027
summary: BNP Paribas has identified Seagate Technology Holdings (NasdaqGS:STX) as a top AI supply chain pick. The bank highlighted Seagate alongside Arista Networks and Astera Labs. The call is tied to expected storage demand related to AI projects through 2027. Seagate Technology sits at the heart of data storage, supplying hard drives and related solutions that support cloud, enterprise, and consumer workloads. As AI projects expand, they tend to require large volumes of data to be stored,...
